title: Cross Guild Dreams of the One Piece
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Bepo, Unknown person #10, Kizaru, Unknown person #11, Bonney, Sabo as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh my! This boy sure likes to play rough!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Western captain of the revolutionary army

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're the ones destroying the city!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just Cough Up Where Your Leader went off to!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You shouldn't sniff around and stalk people, you dirty, little perv!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: FUJITORA, WHAT DO YOU THINK YOU'RE DOING?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm calling in a meteor strike.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be an idiot, that's a terrible idea!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we were anywhere but the home of the gods, that'd be more than enough power to turn any battlefield upside down....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you ignore the handicap, the revolutionary captains are doing well to stand their ground....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Just goes to show, they're no pushovers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ryokugyu, you bastard! I'll see to it that you hang if any of us get hurt!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Damn, it's impossible to fight here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sabo, don't you have the keys to these collars yet?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just found out where they keep them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just spotted him with that dumb father and son Saint duo, Rosward and Charles...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They must still be looking to get revenge for that thing we heard about...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He hasn't given up on getting Shirahoshi...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't forgive them for using Kuma-San Like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, we won't let them get away with it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Morley, make sure every- thing's ready!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't you buzz off?! I'd rather have vice Admiral Garp's help!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that creep's definitely going to target her again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm afraid only King cobra has been permitted an audience with the five elders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This won't take long, and it would be tedious for you to wait outside.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be a much better use of your time to look out for WL.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SHE'S ALWAYS BEEN A MISCHIEVOUS ONE. YOU CAN'T LET HER OUT OF YOUR SIGHT FOR A SECOND!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 56 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
